item.title: Kirloskar Brothers Ltd Surges 10.34% to Day's High of Rs 1868.55 — Outperforms Sector by 11.55 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined by 0.99% on 13 Apr 2026, while Kirloskar Brothers Ltd surged 10.34%, outperforming its sector by 11.55 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market backdrop, signalling a significant shift in short-term momentum. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: JSW Energy Ltd Surges 5.17% to Day's High of Rs 514.45 — Outperforms Sector by 3.78 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined by 0.99% on 13 Apr 2026, while JSW Energy Ltd surged 5.17%, reaching an intraday high of Rs 514.45. That 3.78-percentage-point outperformance over the power sector signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: J K Cements Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 13 Apr 2026
item.description: J K Cements Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 5,433.05, reflecting a 5.09% drop as the stock faced significant price pressure amid broader market volatility and sector-specific headwinds. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Ltd experienced significant intraday weakness on 13 Apr 2026, with the stock touching a low of Rs 370, reflecting a sharp decline of 7.18% from its previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices, continuing a recent downward trend amid persistent selling pressure. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Jayaswal Neco Industries Ltd Surges 7.79% to Day's High of Rs 86.95 — Outperforms Sector by 6.54 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined by 0.98% on 13 Apr 2026, yet Jayaswal Neco Industries Ltd surged 7.79%, outperforming its sector by 6.54 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market backdrop. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Covance Softsol Leads Micro Cap Rally with 216% Return in Six Months
item.description: Covance Softsol has emerged as the standout performer among micro cap stocks over the past six months, delivering an exceptional return of 216.11%, far outpacing its peers and broader market benchmarks. This remarkable surge reflects a combination of strong financials, attractive valuation, and positive technical momentum, positioning the company as a compelling buy in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector. Time: 27 minutes ago

item.title: Covance Softsol Leads Market Rally with Exceptional 2945% Return in One Year
item.description: Covance Softsol, a micro-cap player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, has delivered a staggering 2944.95% return over the past year, vastly outperforming benchmark indices and peers across sectors. This extraordinary performance underscores the company’s robust fundamentals, attractive valuation, and positive technical outlook, making it a standout in a volatile market environment. Time: 28 minutes ago

item.title: Svarnim Trade Udyog Ltd Extends Losing Streak to Multiple Sessions, Hits All-Time Low
item.description: For the sixth consecutive session, Svarnim Trade Udyog Ltd closed lower, this time touching an all-time low of Rs 8.5 on 13 Apr 2026, marking a significant milestone in its prolonged decline. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: New India Assurance Company Ltd Surges 10.46% to Day's High of Rs 175.5 — Outperforms Sector by 13.09 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined by 0.91% on 13 Apr 2026, while New India Assurance Company Ltd surged 10.46%, outperforming its sector by 13.09 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market backdrop. Time: 41 minutes ago

item.title: Cummins India Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 13 Apr 2026
item.description: Shares of Cummins India Ltd. declined sharply on 13 Apr 2026, touching an intraday low of Rs 4,984.3, reflecting a 2.99% drop from the previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and the broader market amid prevailing price pressures and cautious market sentiment. Time: 41 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Arfin India Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 94.1
item.description: Surging past Rs 94.1 on 13 Jun 2026, Arfin India Ltd has marked a remarkable milestone by hitting a fresh 52-week high, propelled by a confluence of robust technical indicators and sustained price momentum. Time: 47 minutes ago

item.title: Waaree Energies Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Signalling Strong Market Positioning
item.description: Waaree Energies Ltd has witnessed a notable surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, reflecting heightened market participation and a potential directional shift. The stock’s recent outperformance against its sector and the broader Sensex, coupled with rising volumes and sustained gains, suggests growing investor confidence and bullish positioning. Time: 57 minutes ago

item.title: Hyundai Motor India Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Hyundai Motor India Ltd has witnessed a significant 18% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity despite the stock’s underperformance and a cautious outlook from analysts. This sudden spike in open interest, coupled with volume patterns and price movements, suggests evolving market positioning and potential directional bets among traders. Time: 57 minutes ago

item.title: Sona BLW Precision Forgings Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Strong Market Momentum
item.description: Sona BLW Precision Forgings Ltd (SONACOMS) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and potential directional bets. The stock’s recent price action, combined with rising volumes and improved investor participation, points to a bullish sentiment among traders and investors alike. Time: 57 minutes ago

item.title: ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Price Action
item.description: ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Company Ltd (ICICIPRULI) has witnessed a notable 12.12% surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite a modest decline in the stock price, the spike in OI alongside volume patterns suggests evolving directional bets and a complex outlook for this mid-cap insurance player. Time: 57 minutes ago

item.title: Amber Enterprises Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Amber Enterprises India Ltd has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite a modest decline in the stock price, the increase in open interest and volume points to evolving directional bets in this small-cap electronics and appliances player. Time: 57 minutes ago

item.title: Adani Power Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Strong Price Momentum
item.description: Adani Power Ltd (ADANIPOWER) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and evolving investor positioning. The stock, which has been on a strong upward trajectory over the past eight sessions, is now attracting renewed attention from traders and institutional participants alike, as reflected in a 29.74% jump in OI alongside robust volume patterns. Time: 57 minutes ago

item.title: Niraj Ispat Industries Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 5.0% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 203.7, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Niraj Ispat Industries Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 5.0% on 13 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 57 minutes ago

item.title: Exxaro Tiles Ltd Locks at Lower Circuit With 8.7% Loss — Sellers Queue, No Buyers in Sight
item.description: At Rs 6.54, sellers were still queuing — but there were no buyers willing to take the other side. Exxaro Tiles Ltd locked at its lower circuit of 10% on 13 Apr 2026, with unfilled sell orders and a frozen price, signalling a pronounced imbalance in supply and demand. Time: 57 minutes ago

item.title: Pavna Industries Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 20% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 21.69, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Pavna Industries Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 19.97% on 13 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 57 minutes ago
